name: recently_added
description: Recently Added view for Volumio's local music library — uses MPD's built-in modified-since query
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Adds a 'Recently Added' entry to the Browse menu showing albums added to your library within configurable time windows. Reads directly from MPD's database — no separate index, no watcher, no native modules.
volumio_info.changelog: v0.5.3: code cleanup applying Volumio reviewer feedback. install.sh stripped to just the plugininstallend marker (Volumio's plugin manager handles npm install itself). Configuration persistence now uses v-conf's standard self.config.set(key, value) API directly; the custom _persistToManagedConfig and _reloadConfig methods (a workaround for a self-inflicted v-conf/writeFileSync race) are gone. Net: ~100 lines removed. v0.5.2: packaging metadata adjustments — added 'os: bookworm' and removed i386 from architectures.
